subcodes.first_line: O Muhammad-'Ali! May the peace of God, His loving-kindness, His glory and His mercy rest upon thee... The Wronged One of 'Akka admonisheth all to fear God, and enjoineth on them whatsoever would exalt man's station
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا محمد قبل علی علیک سلام الله و عنایته و بهاء الله و رحمته الحمد لله در سجن
subcodes.subjects: @exhortations and counsels, @praise and encouragement, @permission for visit; pilgrimage, @consolation and comfort
